title: sempervivum tectorum var. collinum
intro: Sempervivum tectorum var. collinum, also known as the houseleek or living stonecrop, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include treating wounds, burns, and eczema due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Sempervivum tectorum var. collinum include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Sempervivum tectorum var. collinum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions and promote skin health.
